raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "ACA 1 would reduce the local vote threshold for approval of bond and special tax measures from a two-thirds vote to a 55 percent majority.",
    "This proposal will empower California communities to take action at the local level to improve their economies, neighborhoods, and residents’ quality of life.",
    "ACA 1 will give California’s local governments another tool to provide matching-dollars for federal grants to fully take advantage of new funding streams.",
    "For every dollar spent on infrastructure, there is a return benefit of several dollars back to our economy from the related construction jobs and activities.",
    "Investment in critical projects, including fixing streets and roads and deploying broadband, creates new local jobs."
  ]
}
```
